'''rozhanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biangular|biangular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biangular|biangular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rozhanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozhanithi|rozhanithi]] || [[word:rozhaniji|rozhaniji]] || [[word:rozhanishi|rozhanishi]] || [[word:rozhaniki|rozhaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozhanuthuthu|rozhanuthuthu]] || [[word:rozhanujuju|rozhanujuju]] || [[word:rozhanushushu|rozhanushushu]] || [[word:rozhanukuku|rozhanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozhanuthu|rozhanuthu]] || [[word:rozhanuju|rozhanuju]] || [[word:rozhanushu|rozhanushu]] || [[word:rozhanuku|rozhanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozhanufthuf|rozhanufthuf]] || [[word:rozhanufjuf|rozhanufjuf]] || [[word:rozhanufshuf|rozhanufshuf]] || [[word:rozhanufkuf|rozhanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozhanethe|rozhanethe]] || [[word:rozhaneje|rozhaneje]] || [[word:rozhaneshe|rozhaneshe]] || [[word:rozhaneke|rozhaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozhanothotho|rozhanothotho]] || [[word:rozhanojojo|rozhanojojo]] || [[word:rozhanoshosho|rozhanoshosho]] || [[word:rozhanokoko|rozhanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozhanotho|rozhanotho]] || [[word:rozhanojo|rozhanojo]] || [[word:rozhanosho|rozhanosho]] || [[word:rozhanoko|rozhanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozhanofthof|rozhanofthof]] || [[word:rozhanofjof|rozhanofjof]] || [[word:rozhanofshof|rozhanofshof]] || [[word:rozhanofkof|rozhanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozhanïfthïf|rozhanïfthïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfjïf|rozhanïfjïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfshïf|rozhanïfshïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfkïf|rozhanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozhanïfthïfthïf|rozhanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfjïfjïf|rozhanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfshïfshïf|rozhanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfkïfkïf|rozhanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozhanïfthïf|rozhanïfthïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfjïf|rozhanïfjïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfshïf|rozhanïfshïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfkïf|rozhanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozhanïfthïf|rozhanïfthïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfjïf|rozhanïfjïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfshïf|rozhanïfshïf]] || [[word:rozhanïfkïf|rozhanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozhanæthæ|rozhanæthæ]] || [[word:rozhanæjæ|rozhanæjæ]] || [[word:rozhanæshæ|rozhanæshæ]] || [[word:rozhanækæ|rozhanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozhanathatha|rozhanathatha]] || [[word:rozhanajaja|rozhanajaja]] || [[word:rozhanashasha|rozhanashasha]] || [[word:rozhanakaka|rozhanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozhanatha|rozhanatha]] || [[word:rozhanaja|rozhanaja]] || [[word:rozhanasha|rozhanasha]] || [[word:rozhanaka|rozhanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozhanafthaf|rozhanafthaf]] || [[word:rozhanafjaf|rozhanafjaf]] || [[word:rozhanafshaf|rozhanafshaf]] || [[word:rozhanafkaf|rozhanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rozhanasha|rozhanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozhanshësha|rozhanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozhanrosha|rozhanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozhanmusha|rozhanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozhanyasha|rozhanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozhankshësha|gorozhankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozhankrosha|gorozhankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozhankmusha|gorozhankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozhankyasha|gorozhankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rozhazhanasha|rozhazhanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozhazhanshësha|rozhazhanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozhazhanrosha|rozhazhanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozhazhanmusha|rozhazhanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozhazhanyasha|rozhazhanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozhazhankshësha|gorozhazhankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozhazhankrosha|gorozhazhankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozhazhankmusha|gorozhazhankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozhazhankyasha|gorozhazhankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rezhænasha|rezhænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rezhænshësha|rezhænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rezhænrosha|rezhænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rezhænmusha|rezhænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rezhænyasha|rezhænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorezhænkshësha|gorezhænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorezhænkrosha|gorezhænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorezhænkmusha|gorezhænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorezhænkyasha|gorezhænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rozhfanasha|rozhfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozhfanshësha|rozhfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozhfanrosha|rozhfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozhfanmusha|rozhfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozhfanyasha|rozhfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozhfankshësha|gorozhfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozhfankrosha|gorozhfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozhfankmusha|gorozhfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozhfankyasha|gorozhfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
